recheck_requests: Partial-success resume-launch-failed branch is frozen in prose but not in verification
raw_review_excerpt:
Artifact-only review of the current plan finds the prior carried freeze-safety issues textually closed. Remaining concerns are verification-sufficiency concerns: the plan's load-bearing code-reality claims and frozen verify-command targets were not independently checked against local repo files in this review.

Issues:
- 1. [WARN] Repo grounding for load-bearing claims and frozen verify commands is still unproven in this review
closure_verification: The carried round-2/3 issues requested for re-check are textually closed in the current artifact. No still-open prior issue was found in the supplied plan text.

prior_round_closure.title: Partial-success resume-launch-failed branch frozen in prose but not verification
prior_round_closure.caller_claim: The current artifact should explicitly verify the 'decision recorded, resume launch failed' branch, not only describe it.
prior_round_closure.verification_notes: Current artifact adds this branch to P0-T4 freeze details, P2-T4 CLI tests, P99-T1 exit criteria/evidence, exact P99 verify commands, and Acceptance Criteria.

prior_round_closure.title: Legacy paused-run compatibility lacked a frozen end-gate verify hook
prior_round_closure.caller_claim: The current artifact should freeze end-gate verification for legacy paused-run compatibility.
prior_round_closure.verification_notes: Current artifact adds legacy compatibility to P1-T4, P2-T4, P99-T1 exit criteria/evidence, exact verify commands, and Acceptance Criteria.

prior_round_closure.title: V1 API parity boundary needed a more explicit freeze line
prior_round_closure.caller_claim: The current artifact should explicitly freeze the v1 API boundary instead of implying broader parity.
prior_round_closure.verification_notes: Current artifact now freezes the v1 API boundary in P3-T1, distinguishes existing raw run read-back from the missing canonical CLI snapshot, and adds matching API verify commands plus acceptance criteria.

Remaining concerns are verification-sufficiency concerns: the plan's load-bearing code-reality claims and frozen verify-command targets were not independently checked against local repo files in this review.

rubric_cards.evidence: The supplied plan names exact files, commands, and JSON examples; no separate repo/code evidence was inspected in this review.

rubric_cards.title: Disposition Matrix

rubric_cards.claim: Artifact coverage is strong, conversation coverage is limited to the prior-round packet, and campaign coverage is slice-only.
rubric_cards.evidence: Reviewed the supplied plan text, the embedded Peer Review Loop Log, and the prompt's prior-round claims.

rubric_cards.title: Coverage Scope
rubric_cards.claim: This review covers the current plan artifact and prior carried claims only; it does not prove full-thread or full-campaign alignment.
rubric_cards.evidence: No repo-wide inspection, no prior review artifact, and no broader campaign transcript were available in this review.

sources: Peer Review Loop Log inside the supplied document

issues.title: Repo grounding for load-bearing claims and frozen verify commands is still unproven in this review
issues.details: The plan now freezes exact JSON semantics, API boundary language, and P99 `bun test ... -t` verify commands, but this review inspected only the supplied artifact and prior-round packet. That leaves the current-state diagnosis and exact test-target realism unverified against the local repo.
issues.suggested_fix: Before freeze-for-implementation, inspect the cited executor/CLI/API files and referenced test files/names; keep the plan unchanged unless repo reality differs.

verification_gaps: No direct inspection of `packages/workflows/src/executor.ts`, `packages/workflows/src/dag-executor.ts`, `packages/core/src/operations/workflow-operations.ts`, `packages/cli/src/commands/workflow.ts`, or server route tests occurred in this review.
No command execution was performed, so verify-command executability is not proven.
No direct inspection of the prior review artifact was available; closure was checked only against the current plan text and prompt claims.
recommended_fixes: Run one repo-grounded verification pass on the cited runtime surfaces before freezing for implementation.
Confirm the exact P99 and API test file paths/test names locally and adjust only if repo reality differs from the frozen commands.
evidence_sources: Peer Review Loop Log embedded in the supplied document

prior_round_closure.caller_claim: The current artifact should explicitly freeze the v1 API boundary instead of implying broader parity.
prior_round_closure.verification_notes: Current artifact now freezes the v1 API boundary in P3-T1, distinguishes existing raw run read-back from the missing canonical CLI snapshot, and adds matching API verify commands plus acceptance criteria.

review.closure_verification: The carried round-2/3 issues requested for re-check are textually closed in the current artifact. No still-open prior issue was found in the supplied plan text.
workflow_compliance: The plan is phased, scoped, and approval-gated in a workflow-plan-compatible shape.
Exit criteria are present at task level and acceptance criteria are explicit.
Exact P99 verify commands are now frozen instead of left as placeholders.
The plan explicitly records rollback stance, out-of-scope boundaries, and prior review deltas.
technical_reality: The artifact now distinguishes existing raw `GET /api/workflows/runs/:runId` read-back from the missing canonical `HumanGateSnapshot` contract.
Approve/reject JSON semantics now explicitly preserve auto-resume behavior and define a structured `launch_failed` partial-success branch.
Legacy paused-run compatibility and optional stale-gate token enforcement are explicitly called out as v1 behavior.
assumptions_to_verify: The cited runtime files currently behave as summarized in the plan's 'Verified current state' section.
`workflow approve` and `workflow reject` currently auto-resume in the way the plan freezes for JSON semantics.
The referenced CLI and server test files/targets either already exist or can be added at the named paths without contradicting local test layout.
Legacy paused runs can be detected from existing workflow-run metadata without a broader storage redesign.
verification_sufficiency: Sufficient to verify that the current artifact text closes the prior carried review issues.
Not sufficient to prove code-reality claims or exact verify-command executability.
This is a slice review, not a full campaign or repo-grounded freeze sign-off.
downstream_risks: If the cited executor/CLI/API surfaces differ from the artifact summary, implementation could freeze the wrong contract boundary.
If the exact test paths or `-t` names do not match repo reality, the frozen verify commands will need a small correction before they can serve as acceptance proof.
If stale-gate validation currently lives in an unexpected layer, parity work may be broader than the plan presently assumes.
review.freeze_recommendation: Safe to freeze. Carry the remaining WARN/NOTE items as explicit follow-ups or implementation-time checks.
